slides.title: Determine Area of Triangles
slides.full_text: Determine Area of Triangles Lesson launch

slides.title: Do Now
text_items: Estimate which shape has the greater area.
slides.full_text: Do Now What shapes do you notice? Estimate which shape has the greater area.

slides.title: Learning Target
text_items: I can determine the area of a triangle using a related rectangle or parallelogram.
I can identify the base and height.
I can explain why the triangle area formula works.
I can solve a source problem and justify my strategy.
slides.full_text: Learning Target Standard: 6.G.A.1 I can determine the area of a triangle using a related rectangle or parallelogram. Success Criteria I can identify the base and height. I can explain why the triangle area formula works. I can solve a source problem and justify my strategy.

slides.title: Model
text_items: How does the rectangle help you reason about triangle area?
slides.full_text: Model Rectangle area review How does the rectangle help you reason about triangle area?

slides.title: Guided Practice
text_items: Triangle A has base 10 units and height 6 units. What is its area?
slides.full_text: Guided Practice Triangle A has base 10 units and height 6 units. What is its area? Which measurement is the height?

slides.title: Independent Practice
text_items: Find the area of Triangle B with base 12 units and height 9 units.
Show your work and label units.
slides.full_text: Independent Practice Find the area of Triangle B with base 12 units and height 9 units. Show your work and label units.

slides.title: Discussion
text_items: Explain why doubling the triangle creates a parallelogram.
What misconception should we watch for?
slides.full_text: Discussion Explain why doubling the triangle creates a parallelogram. What misconception should we watch for?

slides.title: Exit Ticket
text_items: A triangle has area 24 square units and height 6 units. What is the base?
slides.full_text: Exit Ticket A triangle has area 24 square units and height 6 units. What is the base? Explain your reasoning.
